title: Cobra
desc: A genius mathematician uses his skills to assassinate his targets and stay clear of law enforcement. However, a vigilante secretly tracks his movements, vying for revenge.

title: Googly
desc: Sharath leads a carefree life until he meets Swathi at a college event. A friendship turns into a mutual attraction, but a small misunderstanding causes them to part ways.

title: Pokkiri Raja
desc: Raja takes the blame for a murder committed by his father and is deserted by him. Years later, his father comes seeking his help when his younger brother, Surya, is falsely imprisoned.

title: Agilan
desc: A crane operator begins to take over the illegal business at a dockyard in Chennai, but finds himself in conflict with a gangster.

title: Singam II
desc: Durai Singam, a policeman working an undercover operation, attempts to eliminate a drug trafficking ring in the coastal town of Thoothukudi.
